title: CommandStewardBrief
description: Schema for the Command Steward brief projection. Aggregates health state, blockers, recommended actions, human-required decisions, merge candidates, close candidates, and telemetry into a single read-model for the Steward console. See docs/ai-native/command-steward-agent.md and docs/ai-native/webui-command-steward-console.md.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this brief was last written.

blockers.description: Active blockers preventing automated or manual action. Empty when the system is fully operational.

recommendedActions.description: Context-aware action suggestions based on current system state. Empty when no actions are recommended.

humanRequired.description: Pending decisions that require explicit human judgment. Empty when no human decisions are pending.

mergeCandidates.description: PRs that are eligible for merge. Empty when no PRs are ready.

closeCandidates.description: Issues eligible for closure (done label, all PRs merged). Empty when no issues are ready to close.

telemetry.description: Aggregate telemetry counters for the steward console dashboard.

health.description: Main branch health state. green = all checks pass, yellow = non-critical failure, red = critical failure, black = unrecoverable.

trust.description: Current trust score (0-100). >= 70 green, 40-69 yellow, < 40 red.

healthReason.description: Human-readable explanation for the health state. Null when not applicable.

exhausted.description: Number of providers with exhausted key pools.

cooling.description: Number of workers in cooling state.

pending.description: Number of pending tasks in the queue.

blocked.description: Number of tasks blocked by exhaustion or conflict.

code.description: Blocker classification code (e.g. health-red, conflict-collision, lock-unavailable).

affectedScope.description: Scope affected by this blocker (e.g. issue number, conflict group, lock name). Null when global.

actionId.description: Action identifier (e.g. launch-batch, provider-rotation, process-merge-queue, issue-state, review-health-gate, export-audit, provider-retry).

title.description: Human-readable action title for the console card.

reason.description: One-line explanation of why this action is recommended.

enabled.description: Whether the action is currently available. False when blocked by a gate or precondition.

disabledReason.description: Explanation of why the action is disabled. Null when enabled is true.

confirmationPhrase.description: Required confirmation phrase for execute (e.g. LAUNCH, MERGE, RETRY). Null when single-click is sufficient.

decisionId.description: Unique identifier for this decision (e.g. merge-pr-456, launch-wave-7).

title.description: Short summary of the decision for the console card.

context.description: Contextual details for the decision (e.g. risk score, guard results, health state).

targetLink.description: Navigation link to the relevant control screen. Null when no deep link is available.

mergeable.description: Whether the PR is currently mergeable (no conflicts, not draft).

checksPass.description: Whether all required CI checks pass.

riskScore.description: Guard-computed risk score. Null when guards have not run.

issueNumber.description: Linked issue number. Null when not linked.

allPrsMerged.description: Whether all linked PRs are merged.

linkedPrs.description: List of linked PR numbers. Empty when no PRs are linked.

totalWorkersLaunched.description: Cumulative count of workers launched in this session.

totalPrsMerged.description: Cumulative count of PRs merged in this session.

totalIssuesClosed.description: Cumulative count of issues closed in this session.

totalActionsExecuted.description: Cumulative count of all actions executed in this session.

totalEscalations.description: Cumulative count of escalations surfaced to the human operator.

sessionDuration.description: Elapsed session duration in seconds. Null when session start is unknown.
